title: CGM Food Glucose Prediction
scaleReason: Spans api + domain + data + infra: a new carb-based predicted label on meal logging, a new CGM-delta impact card, a 30-min grouping engine with 2-hour lifecycles, and CGM-graph marker enhancements. It extends the existing Food Module Insight feature (the prior 'Food Glucose Impact Card / 2.5') and the diabetes elog workflow rather than standing alone.
graphNotes: Graph re-indexed 2026-06-08: lookups now resolve cleanly to the in-scope net8 tree (Welldoc.Web.Member.API / *_DotNetCore) with ambiguous=false and no legacy 4.8 twins. The earlier Welldoc.Web.WebApi / Welldoc.Web.Service duplicates are gone.

RESOLVED prior unknown: the existing 'Food Glucose Impact Card (2.5 requirements)' maps to the Food Module Insight feature - DTOs FoodModuleInsightRequest/Response/DetailDTO (Mesh) + view DTOs FoodModuleInsightDTO/Detail, generated via DiabetesElogBridgeService.SaveFoodModuleInsights*/GetInsightApiRequest*/GetFooduModuleInsight and triggered on food-add by FoodInsightForFoodAddTriggerWorkFlow. The existing category-based insight (Category2/3/4) is the analog of the new impact categorization.

DiabetesElogWorkflow already emits EventBus domain events on food log create/update (GenerateFoodItemsCreatedEvent, GenerateFoodItemsUpdatedEvent, FoodCombinationUpdateEvent) - the grounded mechanism for the background-timer materialization option (AV-004), consistent with tech_standards Section 5.4 (WellDoc.Domain.EventBus / MESSAGE_BROKER_TYPE).

seedSymbols.name: MealController.Create / Update / Delete
seedSymbols.note: Meal-log API surface. Create = predicted-label trigger (BL-003); Update = in-window carb re-evaluation without resetting the 2h timer (BL-007/008); Delete = dismiss label + suppress card + re-evaluate group (constraint).

seedSymbols.name: FoodController (GetFoodCarbInsightMessage / GetFoodModuleLookupData)
seedSymbols.note: Food Module logging + carb-insight host (uses FoodBridge). GetFoodCarbInsightMessage (CarbInsightRequestDTO -> FoodCarbInsightMessageDTO) is the precedent shape for the carb-based predicted label (BL-005). A new predicted-label / impact endpoint should follow this controller's conventions (ControllerBase, [WelldocAuthorize], FoodBridge, IHttpContextAccessor).

seedSymbols.name: AGPGraphController.GetAGPGraphData
seedSymbols.note: CGM graph data endpoint (AgpGraphRequestDTO -> AgpGraphDTO). Blue-dotted per-meal markers, one per individual log even within a group (BL-026/027), extend this response.

seedSymbols.name: DiabetesElogWorkflow (Create / Update / GetElogCarbEntryFromDB / GetElogFoodItemFromDB)
seedSymbols.note: PRIMARY domain workflow for meal logging. Create/Update are where carb-based prediction attaches at log/edit time; GetElogCarbEntryFromDB/GetElogFoodItemFromDB supply carbs for the band logic (BL-005/007). Implements IDiabetesElogWorkflow (Welldoc.Mesh.Workflow.Contracts), resolved via WorkflowFactory.

seedSymbols.name: DiabetesElogWorkflow food events (GenerateFoodItemsCreatedEvent / GenerateFoodItemsUpdatedEvent / FoodCombinationUpdateEvent)
seedSymbols.note: Existing EventBus events fired on food log create/update/combination. NOT on the critical path given the Checkpoint B compute-on-read decision (no background materialization). Retained as a reference only - may be used to invalidate any read cache, not to drive the 2h timer.

seedSymbols.name: DiabetesElogBridgeService.GetExistingCarbsValue / GetExistingJustCarbsValue
seedSymbols.note: Existing carb-retrieval helpers - reuse for the carb-band predictor (BL-005) and the edit re-evaluation (BL-007). Graph shows no callers (utility), so blast radius of reuse is low.

seedSymbols.name: DiabetesElogBridgeService Food Module Insight family (SaveFoodModuleInsights[+ForCategory2/3/4], GetInsightApiRequest[+Category2/3/4/ForNoFoodLog], GenerateMessageForPatientsWith*NutrientTarget, GetFooduModuleInsight, PostFoodModuleInsightFeedback, GetPatientDetailsForFoodInsight)
seedSymbols.note: This IS the existing 'Food Glucose Impact Card (2.5)' surface (Food Module Insight). The new predicted label and CGM-delta impact card extend this category-based insight rather than creating a parallel feature. Decide whether to add a new category vs a sibling capability at Checkpoint B.

seedSymbols.name: FoodInsightForFoodAddTriggerWorkFlow
seedSymbols.note: Existing 'on food add -> generate insight + save history + call third-party API' trigger workflow. Direct precedent (and likely extension point) for the immediate predicted-label trigger (BL-003).

seedSymbols.name: DiabetesElogWorkflow / DiabetesElogBridgeService food-combination methods (Create/Update/Delete/Get FoodCombination, GetFoodCombinationItemDetails, GetSyncSavedMealWrapper)
seedSymbols.note: Existing 'food combination' mechanism that models multi-item meals. DECIDED at Checkpoint B: do NOT reuse for this feature - the 30-min grouping is a NEW time-window concept. Listed for awareness/contrast so a slice does not accidentally entangle with food-combinations.

seedSymbols.name: DiabetesElogBridgeService.GetGlucoseContentDetails / SyncCGMBG / GetCGMAIPredictionDetails (IDiabetesElogBridgeService)
seedSymbols.note: CGM reading path (interface IDiabetesElogBridgeService in Welldoc.Mesh.Gateway.Contracts). Source for delta_CGM_food (peak in +2h, trough in -30min) per BL-016. Confirm which method yields the raw CGM time-series usable for peak/trough extraction (callees not indexed - delegates to a platform binary).

seedSymbols.name: GlucosePredictionDTO / GlucosePredictionRequestDTO / PredictedGlucoseDTO
seedSymbols.note: Existing CGM glucose-forecast contracts (predicted glucose CURVE). NOT the food impact label/card - do not overload. Listed to prevent the decomposer from reusing the wrong DTO.

seedSymbols.name: FoodModuleInsight DTOs (FoodModuleInsightRequestDTO / FoodModuleInsightResponseDTO / FoodModuleInsightDetailDTO; view DTOs FoodModuleInsightDTO / FoodModuleInsightDetail)
seedSymbols.note: Existing insight contract to extend for the predicted label and impact card (or to mirror for new sibling DTOs). View DTOs live in Welldoc.Web.Service_DotNetCore/Welldoc.Web.View.DTO/Elog/.

seedSymbols.name: LibreConnectController + DexcomPilotIntegrationWorkflow (eligibility)
seedSymbols.note: Eligibility (BL-001): feature applies only to an active LIBRE CGM connection; Dexcom is excluded (a real Dexcom/DexcomPilotIntegrationWorkflow exists, so the exclusion is meaningful). Confirm the canonical 'active Libre CGM' check and the DM / MR1.x-MR4.x segment source (BL-002).

seedSymbols.name: CGMPredictionController.GetCGMProbabilityPrediction
seedSymbols.note: Existing CGM probability prediction (GenAI). Controller-placement precedent only; distinct from food-carb impact.

seedSymbols.name: FoodGlucosePrediction capability (carb-band predictor, CGM-delta calculator, 30-min grouping engine, 2h label/card lifecycle, new/extended DTOs)
seedSymbols.note: NEW logic: carb-band predictor (BL-005), CGM-delta calculator (BL-016/017), 30-min grouping with summed carbs (BL-018/020), 2h predicted-label + card lifecycle (BL-006/019). DECIDED at Checkpoint B: persist via Welldoc.Server.Infra.JSONRepository (Mongo, I*Repository + JSONRepositoryFactory); COMPUTE-ON-READ for both predicted-label-active (t..t+2h) and impact-card materialization (no background job); 30-min grouping implemented as a NEW time-window concept, separate from the existing food-combination mechanism. No EF.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given a non-Libre (e.g. Dexcom) or no-CGM user, When a meal is logged, Then no prediction label is shown.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-001: Feature triggers only for users with an active CGM connection; Libre users only, not Dexcom.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given an eligible user logs a meal of N g carbs, When logging completes, Then the predicted label = Low (N<=20) / Medium (21<=N<=100) / High (N>100).
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-005: Predicted impact (carb-based): <=20g Low; 21-100g (inclusive) Medium; >100g High (100g = Medium, Checkpoint A).

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given a meal logged at t, When 2h elapse, Then the predicted label is dismissed at exactly t+2h.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-006: Prediction label remains active exactly 2 hours post food logging; after 2 hours it is dismissed.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given a meal edited within the window, When the edit is saved, Then carbs are re-evaluated immediately and the label updates, with the t+2h timer unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-007: Editing within the 2h window re-evaluates carbs immediately and updates the label. BL-008: Editing does not reset the 2h countdown; dismissal/card timing stays anchored to the original log time.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given any logging method (photo/barcode/nutrition label/food search/AL meal/database meal), When a meal is logged, Then the prediction triggers.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-003: Immediately after a meal is logged (photo, barcode, nutrition label, food search, AL meal, or database meal) in the Food Module, analyze carbs and display a prediction label under the logged meal.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given a single logged meal at t, When t+2h is reached, Then a Food Glucose Impact Card appears on My Glucose with the CGM-delta label.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-019: Single meal generates the Glucose Impact Card exactly 2h after logging. BL-016: delta_CGM_food = peak(CGM, +2h) - trough(CGM, -30min); grouped: trough before first log, peak after last log. BL-017: <20 Low; 20-50 (inclusive) Medium; >50 High mg/dL.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given CGM data, When the card is computed, Then label = Low (delta<20) / Medium (20<=delta<=50) / High (delta>50) mg/dL.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-017: Actual impact label (delta-based): <20 Low; 20-50 (inclusive) Medium; >50 High mg/dL (50 = Medium, Checkpoint A).

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given two meals logged < 30 min apart, When 2h elapse after the last in-window log, Then their carbs are summed into one grouped card timestamped at the first log.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-020: 30-min window begins at the initial log; food logged <30min after is grouped, carbs summed; one card, timestamped at the first log, materializing 2h after the LAST in-window log. BL-012: Card timestamp HH:MM [AM/PM]; for grouped meals show the first item's timestamp.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given a second meal logged >= 30 min after the first, When logged, Then it produces its own separate prediction and card.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-021: Food logged outside 30 min of the initial log starts a new separate window and its own card. BL-022: A second meal logged >30 min after the first is a distinct event with its own card.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given the Impact Card, When rendered, Then it shows meal type, HH:MM [AM/PM], MMM DD (year hidden), comma-separated ellipsis-truncated food list, and a thumbnail circle colored by impact.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-011 meal type; BL-012 HH:MM [AM/PM] (first item for groups); BL-013 MMM DD, year hidden across years; BL-014 comma-separated list from first item, ellipsis if >1 line; BL-015 thumbnail circle colored High=Red/Medium=Yellow/Low=Green.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given multiple meals within the grouping window, When the CGM graph renders, Then one blue dotted bar appears per individual log at its exact timestamp.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-026: For every unique food log, a vertical blue dotted bar at the exact log timestamp. BL-027: Within a 30-min group, a separate bar per individual meal, even though they map to one card.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given the Logged Meals section, When the info hyperlink is tapped, Then an overlay opens; When X is tapped, Then it closes.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-009: Display the 'How do we predict the glucose impact?' hyperlink below the Logged Meals title and above all logged meals. BL-010: Tapping it opens an overlay (content per content sheet) with an X that closes it.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Given an Impact Card, When tapped, Then the Detail Screen for Glucose Impact Food opens.
acceptanceCriteria.verifiesText: BL-024: Clicking the Food Glucose Impact Card navigates to the Detail Screen for Glucose Impact Food (per current implementation).

Food Module: DiabetesElogBridgeService Food Module Insight family (SaveFoodModuleInsights[+ForCategory2/3/4], GetInsightApiRequest[+Category2/3/4/ForNoFoodLog], GenerateMessageForPatientsWith*NutrientTarget, GetFooduModuleInsight, PostFoodModuleInsightFeedback, GetPatientDetailsForFoodInsight)
FoodGlucosePrediction capability (carb-band predictor, CGM-delta calculator, 30-min grouping engine, 2h label/card lifecycle, new/extended DTOs)

apis.Food Glucose Prediction API: FoodGlucosePrediction capability (carb-band predictor, CGM-delta calculator, 30-min grouping engine, 2h label/card lifecycle, new/extended DTOs)

Food Glucose Prediction Flow: FoodGlucosePrediction capability (carb-band predictor, CGM-delta calculator, 30-min grouping engine, 2h label/card lifecycle, new/extended DTOs)

outOfScope: Dexcom CGM users - feature is Libre-only (BL-001).
Non-DM conditions and MR segments outside MR1.x-MR4.x (BL-002).
Historical / backfilled meal logs - no retroactive predictions or cards for meals logged before the feature ships.
Detail Screen and base CGM-graph rendering - reused unchanged (BL-023/024/025); only the multi-meal blue-dotted markers (BL-027) are new.
constraints: Missing/uncomputable CGM delta (sensor gap, no trough in -30min or no peak in +2h, Libre disconnected): suppress the Impact Card silently for that meal; the predicted label still behaves normally during its window.
Meal deleted within the 2h window: dismiss the predicted label and produce no Impact Card; for a grouped meal, re-evaluate the group with the remaining items.
Backdated entry whose 2h window is entirely in the past: generate no predicted label or card (consistent with historical backfill being out of scope) [derived - confirm].
Each card computes its delta independently over its own anchored window; shared CGM readings may contribute to more than one card - no cross-card de-duplication [derived - confirm].
Use the existing platform timestamp/timezone handling ('current implementation') for all 2h/30-min window math and HH:MM / MMM DD display [derived - confirm].
PHI: CGM glucose + meal data is PHI (Cyber security gate = Y). Commit no new secrets; do not log secret values.

net8 standards (tech_standards.md): controllers ControllerBase + [ApiController] + [Route("api/[controller]")] + explicit [Http*]/[Route], inject IHttpContextAccessor; config via Environment.GetEnvironmentVariable with keys under AppSettings; NO Entity Framework (use MongoDB.Driver via Infra.JSONRepository for this feature's state); Welldoc domain factories via static *FactoryLocator / WorkflowFactory (not the DI container); Libre access via Welldoc.Integration.Libre_DotNetCore.

Checkpoint B architecture decision: persist new state in Welldoc.Server.Infra.JSONRepository (Mongo, I*Repository + JSONRepositoryFactory); COMPUTE-ON-READ for predicted-label visibility (active during t..t+2h) and impact-card materialization (no background job / no scheduler); implement the 30-min grouping as a NEW time-window concept, separate from the existing food-combination mechanism.
Gates answered at Checkpoint A: Risk Analysis = Y, Data Requirements = Y, Designs available = Y, Cyber security = Y, CRM = N.
resolvedAtCheckpointB: Persistence: new predicted-label/card/grouping state stored in Welldoc.Server.Infra.JSONRepository (Mongo).
Timer model: COMPUTE-ON-READ - predicted-label visibility and impact-card materialization are computed when the client reads; no background job/scheduler.
Grouping: NEW 30-min time-window concept, separate from the existing food-combination mechanism.

unresolved.name: Detail Screen for Glucose Impact Food endpoint
unresolved.note: Referenced as 'current implementation' (out of scope to change) but the exact existing endpoint the card deep-links to is not pinned. Minor - confirm during slice review.
